Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Continued To Aug-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Samuel Welles, Esq., for Yoongi Tom, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel offers an update regarding the status of the estate, stating that the estate is insolvent. Counsel notes that the Inventory and Appraisal is with the probate referee and should be filed soon. Counsel confirms that he is currently working with the Acuna Regli firm and advises that he will be taking leave of absence soon and has submitted his personal contact information to the court accordingly. Counsel requests a continuance of six months.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Aug-07-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file any updates regarding the status of the estate with the court by Jul-22-2024.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition For Allowance Of Ordinary And Extraordinary Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs Advanced By Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

Off Calendar Jan-10-2024 Continued To Feb-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Samuel Welles appeared via zoom for Yoogni Knag Tom (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding Mr. Tom not having a succession plan for his bicycle business, that there is outstanding tax obligations pertaining to the business, and that there are multiple creditors' claims that have come forth. The Court ordered Mr. Welles to file an inventory and appraisal and report of status of administration on January 24, 2024. The matter is continued to February 07, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Visiting Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported

Petition For Allowance Of Ordinary And Extraordinary Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs Advanced By Counsel

Petition 1. To Accept Resignation Of Co-Administrator And 2. To Amend Order For Probate
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel L. Welles, via Zoom, for and with Yoongi K. Tom, and Patricia Scott, co-Administrators.

The court confirms with counsel that the sole action taken by either Administrator has been the assignment of Ms. Tom by unanimous vote to director of the related business which was required to continue operation of the business and avoid any harm to the business. The court and counsel discuss the history of this matter from the initial filing to his taking this matter in late May of this year up to the filing of the instant petition when he realized that the Estate did not require co-Administrators. After additional discussion, the court accepts the resignation of Patricia Scott and advises counsel to file Letters of Administration and Inventory and Appraisal forthwith. A Status on the Filing of Letters of Administration is set for Dec-28-2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. A Status of Filing Inventory and Appraisal is set for May-10-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Status on Close of Estate currently set for Mar-06-2023 is continued to Jan-10-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The court reconfirms acceptance of resignation of co-Administrator Patricia Scott and takes the remaining subject matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

Petition 1. To Accept Resignation Of Co-Administrator And 2. To Amend Order For Probate
